name: Gutenberg-Boilerplate
description: 🔰 WordPress Gutenberg Boilerplate! — Easy to understand and extensively inline documented starter WordPress plugin for the new Gutenberg editor. Think of it like a create-react-app for WP Gutenberg. ——— I now recommend 🔥 ⚛‏ 📦  `create-guten-block` → https://Awais.dev/cgb
